examples: Metaphoric thinking and animistic thinking enable the fuzzy boundaries of categories in fairy tales.
Estonian mythology is based on primitive animistic beliefs and is closely related to Finnish mythology.
The beliefs of animistic Buddhism inform the figures from folklore and legend positioned all around the park.
It is animistic, attributing personalized souls to animals, vegetables and even rocks.
The Nongkrem dance is hosted by the Syiem of Khyrim, custodian of the original animistic religion in a society that is now mostly Catholic Christian.
